message:
feat(core,tui): add config validation infrastructure and expand TUI runtime lifecycle

Core:
- config.rs: add 134 lines implementing configuration validation with
  schema checks, bounds enforcement, and human-readable error reporting
  for ballast allocation parameters

TUI:
- runtime.rs: major expansion (187 lines) adding event loop lifecycle
  improvements including graceful shutdown sequencing, tick-rate
  auto-tuning based on system load, and state snapshot persistence
  for crash recovery
- render.rs: minor rendering adjustments (9 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
